mapper.sql: id, task_no, equipment_name, equipment_code, customer_name, task_type, assignee, plan_date, actual_date, status, result, description, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_inspection_task WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tbl_inspection_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tbl_inspection_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND plan_date < CURDATE() AND status != 2
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tbl_inspection_task WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_inspection_task ( task_no, equipment_name, equipment_code, customer_name, task_type, assignee, plan_date, actual_date, status, result, description, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{taskNo}, #{equipmentName}, #{equipmentCode}, #{customerName}, #{taskType}, #{assignee}, #{planDate}, #{actualDate}, #{status}, #{result}, #{description}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_inspection_task
update_time = NOW(), task_no = #{taskNo}, equipment_name = #{equipmentName}, equipment_code = #{equipmentCode}, customer_name = #{customerName}, task_type = #{taskType}, assignee = #{assignee}, plan_date = #{planDate}, actual_date = #{actualDate}, status = #{status}, result = #{result}, description = #{description},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_inspection_task SET status = #{newStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_inspection_task SET status = 1, actual_date = #{actualDate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_inspection_task SET status = #{status}, result = #{result}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_inspection_task SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT task_no FROM tbl_inspection_task WHERE task_no LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%') ORDER BY task_no DESC LIMIT 1
